'''Grez Squadron''' was a squadron of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighters]]. They launched from the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Colada]]'' during an attack by [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] on the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]]-owned supply platform in the [[Goff system/Legends|Goff system]].

Following the lead taken by [[Azul Squadron]], the ships of Grez selected Interdictor ''[[Compellor]]'' as their primary target, attacking it with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].
Alert to their adversaries, the attacking [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, with the modified [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] of [[Avenger Squadron]] in the vanguard, made short work of the lumbering Y-wings. The ''Compellor'' was saved from destruction.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
